# kCGImagePropertyGIFDictionary

**Global Variable**

A dictionary of key-value pairs for an image that uses Graphics Interchange Format (GIF).

## Declaration

```swift
let kCGImagePropertyGIFDictionary: CFString
```

## Discussion

For more information about the available metadata keys, see [doc://com.apple.imageio/documentation/ImageIO/gif-image-properties].
